_comment: Whole-arc comprehensive-oracle no-regress baseline, captured 2026-07-20 on the post-gap-closure build (CRAM 2048 scan + Nyquist magenta accumulators + dead-SFX channel witness + FN-2 BLIND guard + FN-4/FN-6/FP-2). Each [scene,code] is a KNOWN divergence in this build; a future run FAILS on any NEW key in a scene BOTH runs covered. Regenerate via --baseline after a fix clears items.
